chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-485 of 2007 Malir Development Authority Versus Muhammad Saleem & others A N D 1699 of 2007 Malir Development Authority Versus 1st. Addl. District & Sessions Judge & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection in CP No.D-1699/07 2. For orders on exemption application in CP No.D-1699/07 3. For hearing of stay applications in both the petitions. 4. For hearing of main cases. Dated: 26.04.2024 None present for petitioner and contesting respondents. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General. -.-.- Both these petitions have arisen out of the same suit i.e. Suit No.129 of 2003 and hence are coming up together. C.P. No.D-485 of 2007 has impugned order dated 28.11.2006 whereas C.P. No.D-1699 of 2007 assailed an order of 19.04.2007, which orders have upset the orders of the trial Court dated 05.04.2006 and 17.02.2007 in Suit No.129 of 2003 and Execution No.29 of 2005 (arising out of Suit No.129 of 2003) respectively. The impugned orders passed in Civil Revisions shown to have been passed in the interest of justice in the penultimate paragraphs. These petitions are pending since 2007 and today neither petitioner’s counsel nor anyone from respondents’ side is in attendance. This being the situation we dismiss these petitions for non-prosecution along with pending applications. Judge Judge
